Explanation_Rule: HR is 0 and ECG is flatline. Motor at Max PWM to assist chest contractions.
HR is 0 and ECG is flatline. Immediate intervention required.
HR is < 40 and SpO2 is < 90%. Motor at Medium PWM to aid circulation.
HR under 40, patient experiencing severe hypoxia.
HR is between 40-60 bpm and SpO2 is 90-95%.
Mild bradycardia with normal or near-normal SpO2.
HR is > 60 bpm and SpO2 is > 95%. No active CPR required.
Vitals well within normal healthy range. Motor stopped.
